description: Canonical easing values consumed by references/motion.md. Update here first; the markdown table mirrors these values for teaching. Pick by scenario, not by aesthetic preference.

spring-snappy.use_for: default spring. bounce always 0 unless explicitly playful

forbidden.bounce_elastic: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, ...) and similar — feel dated and draw attention to the animation itself
forbidden.linear_for_spatial: linear is reserved for progress bars and time-based representations; never for spatial motion
forbidden.ease_in_for_ui: ease-in starts slow exactly when the user is watching most closely — feels slower than ease-out at the same duration
